::: {#tbl-speed .unittable}

| [US](#us){.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="United States"} speed units | [mv](#mv){.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="milliomegars"} | [kmph](#kmph){#kilometersperhour .bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="kilometers per hour"} |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [0.9448]{.colorPerS} [inches/second](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Inch_per_second)       |  0.05625                                                                     |  0.09375                                                                         |
| [0.9448]{.colorPerS} [feet/second](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Foot_per_second)         |  0.675                                                                       |  0.675                                                                           |
| [0.9942]{.colorMile} [miles/hour](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Miles_per_hour)           |  0.96                                                                        |  1.6                                                                             |
| [0.9448]{.colorPerS} yards/second                                                         |  2.025                                                                       |  3.375                                                                           |

:::
